name: Full workflow
intent: The Explore and Audit patterns chained into one flow: pick a registry listing, dissect its use cases, vet its safety, and land on a verdict.

input.label: the skill or tool to evaluate
input.hint: pick the registry listing you want a decision on

pin.name: Rokha Registry Search
pin.description: Search the Rokha Registry of published agent skills, harnesses, and rigs — Rokha runs it over her own MCP registry tools.

steps.expects: the skill/tool the user wants to evaluate (its name)
steps.instruction: Search the Rokha Registry for the skill/tool the user named as the input. Pull up everything about it: what it does, how it runs, who made it.
steps.produces: the chosen listing + what it does and how it runs

steps.expects: the chosen listing + what it does
steps.instruction: Using the previous step's listing, dissect its use cases: three concrete workflows it enables, what registry skills pair well with it, and who it's for.
steps.produces: three use cases + best pairings + who it's for

steps.instruction: Give the same listing the safety read: what it accesses (tools, endpoints, credentials), trust boundaries, what could go wrong, and any red flags.

steps.expects: the use cases + the safety read
steps.instruction: Combine the exploration and the safety read into one decision brief, ending in a clear adopt / try-with-care / avoid verdict.
steps.produces: a decision brief with an adopt/try-with-care/avoid verdict
